name: @stewra/bridge
description: Stewra Bridge — the companion-device app that runs on the user's OWN computer. It holds the WhatsApp connection; Stewra's servers never do.
author: Stewra

stewra.comment: Declared production default baked into packaged builds by scripts/inject-config.mjs. Override at package time with STEWRA_API_URL (e.g. for staging).

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.test:esm-interop: node --input-type=module -e "import { BRIDGE_CLIENT_EVENTS } from '@stewra/shared-types'; import { DisconnectReason } from '@whiskeysockets/baileys'; if (!BRIDGE_CLIENT_EVENTS?.HELLO || !DisconnectReason?.loggedOut) { throw new Error('ESM named-export interop is broken'); }"
scripts.package: npm run build && node scripts/inject-config.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && node scripts/inject-config.mjs && electron-builder --linux
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && node scripts/inject-config.mjs && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build && node scripts/inject-config.mjs && electron-builder --win
